title: QCon London 2026: Ethical AI Is an Engineering Problem
summary: At QCon London 2026, Clara Higuera, Responsible AI Program Lead at BBVA, presented how many of the risks associated with AI systems are fundamentally engineering challenges rather than purely governance or policy issues. By Daniel Dominguez
